title: ZXBrick Overview
description: A practical introduction to ZXBrick, the core gameplay loop, and supporting systems.
summary: ZXBrick is a retro brick-breaking arcade game in the ZX Series with level progression, achievements, and shared wallet support.
sourceNotes: Detailed control tuning and exact level pacing details are to verify from app source or QA notes.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: ZXBrick is a retro-inspired brick-breaking game in the [ZX Series](/zx-series). It combines level progression, unlock systems, and replay-focused progression loops through achievements, leaderboards, and shared currency support.
Players typically progress through 100 handcrafted stages, build momentum through repeated sessions, and use achievement and leaderboard feedback to guide improvement over time.

sections.heading: Where to start
paragraphs: Start with How to Play, then read Controls and Game Modes before exploring power-ups and strategy pages.
Use the guide navigation at the top of each page to move between sections quickly.

sections.heading: How this connects to the ZX Series
paragraphs: The guide is connected to other ZX Series pages where shared progression systems are used, including [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series).
